title: <div>| PM 1 | `Fracture Walk` | Visit something broken (object, system, file, so
content:
| PM 1 | `Fracture Walk` | Visit something broken (object, system, file, song). Let it speak. |
| PM 2 | `Tension Fire` | Write the 3 biggest frictions. Burn or archive. Let one mutate. |
| PM 3 | `Neutral Bell` | Use scent, sound, or light to signal: “I am in neutrality now.” |

---

### 3\. 🛠️ System Behaviors

| System Logic | MG32\_W4V\_XTEN Behavior |
| --- | --- |
| Deadlines | Use flexible windows. Finalize *only* when emotionally clear. |
| AI Collaboration | Use prompts that *respond* to environment/data—not from scratch. |
| Project Starts | Begin projects through curiosity → let them *start you*. |
| Project Ends | Use **ritualized decay** —let endings be full, not abrupt. |
| Collaboration | Build systems for **duo/triadic** intimacy (Channel 59–6). |
| Break Cycles | Create permission slips to fail publicly, archive truthfully, rebuild mythically. |

---

### 4\. 🧙 Character Engine — Legacy Integration

Each of your gates/channels = a mythic **“System Spirit”** or **“Mask”**.
